subject: [PATCH v7 15/20] nfsd: allow encoding a filehandle into fattr4 without a svc_fh

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch allows the encoding of a filehandle into fattr4 without requiring a svc_fh. It achieves this by adding a new 'fhandle' field to struct nfsd4_fattr_args and populating it from the svc_fh in CB_NOTIFY callbacks. The MAC append function is generalized to operate on bare knfsd_fh, and the FSID attribute shares the same attrmask gate as the filehandle.
